markets.question: Spread: CD Huachipato (-1.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming Chile Primera game, scheduled for March 16 at 7:30 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "CD Huachipato" if CD Huachipato win the game by 2 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "CSD Colo-Colo".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on anfp.cl. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

markets.question: ENPPI vs. Zamalek SC: O/U 3.5
markets.description:
In the upcoming Egypt Egyptian Premier League game between ENPPI and Zamalek SC, scheduled for March 11 at 3:30 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if ENPPI and Zamalek SC combine to score 4 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 4, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on efa.com.eg. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.
